name: Sistergrannybananadandy
author: Brad Fortner
bootlegger: All "Townsfolk" must make a Klutz pick, or their team loses, including a Hermit, who does not turn. During a boom, choose each player to die, and give them time for a Klutz pick before moving on. After several deaths at night, announce all in the order you choose, then take picks in that order. A Hermit who ends the game with their pick should often win with evil. Politician as good twin should be a rare occurrence / last resort. 12 or fewer players allows for more control, but chaotic world-building is baked in, so maybe let go and see what happens.
